texto: Some days you feel like you're the worst of sinners
autor: others like you're the most righteous person on earth. I am convinced that the former is when you're closest to God.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a others like you're the most righteous person on earth. I am convinced that the former is when you're closest to God.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Some days you feel like you're the worst of sinners” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, criss-jami, healology pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de healology.
